name: Basic Pit Trap
description: A camouflaged pit covered with a thin layer of sticks and debris. Those who step on it fall 10 feet to the hard stone floor below.

name: Poison Needle Trap
description: A tiny poisoned needle is concealed in a lock or latch. When the mechanism is touched, the needle springs out and pricks the victim, delivering greenblood oil poison.

name: Basic Arrow Trap
description: A hidden crossbow mechanism fires an arrow when someone passes through a tripwire. The bolt launches from a concealed slot in the wall.

name: Scything Blade Trap
description: A razor-sharp blade sweeps across the corridor at waist height when a pressure plate is depressed. The mechanism resets automatically.

name: Swinging Block Trap
description: A massive stone block swings down from the ceiling on chains when a door handle or lever is pulled. The block crashes into anyone standing in its path.

name: Fusillade of Darts
description: Tiny holes in the walls conceal spring-loaded darts. When triggered, a volley of 1d4 darts fires at each target in the area.

name: Rolling Rock Trap
description: A large boulder is balanced atop a ramp behind a concealed panel. When the trigger is sprung, the boulder rolls down and crushes anything in its path.

name: Burning Hands Trap
description: A magical glyph on the floor detects nearby creatures and unleashes a fan of flames. The burning hands spell scorches all in its path.

name: Spiked Pit Trap
description: A covered pit 20 feet deep with sharpened wooden stakes at the bottom. Those who fall in take damage from both the fall and the spikes that impale them.

name: Bricks from Ceiling
description: A section of ceiling has been weakened and rigged to collapse when a door is opened or a tripwire is disturbed. Heavy bricks rain down on all nearby.

name: Pit Trap with Spikes
description: A well-concealed spiked pit 20 feet deep with iron spikes at the bottom. The cover is expertly disguised as normal floor. Multiple creatures can fall in.

name: Hail of Needles
description: Hundreds of tiny needles are launched from concealed tubes in the walls when a pressure plate is stepped on. The needles fly with deadly accuracy.

name: Lightning Bolt Trap
description: A crackling arc of lightning blasts forth from a concealed runestone when a creature enters the warded area. The bolt streaks down the corridor in a line.

name: Wall Scythe Trap
description: A massive scythe blade is concealed within the wall. When triggered, it sweeps outward in a deadly arc, capable of cutting a person in two.

name: Water-Filled Room Trap
description: When triggered, hidden pipes begin flooding the sealed room with water. The room fills completely in 5 rounds, drowning anyone trapped inside.

name: Flooding Room Trap
description: A large chamber sealed by heavy doors. When creatures enter, the doors slam shut and water rushes in from hidden channels. The room floods in 4 rounds.

name: Poison Gas Trap
description: Vents hidden in the walls release deadly burnt othur fumes when a pressure plate is triggered. The toxic gas fills the sealed chamber in 3 rounds, choking all within.

name: Blade Barrier Trap
description: An invisible ward creates a whirling curtain of razor-sharp blades when breached. The magical blades slice through anything attempting to pass through the barrier.

name: Symbol of Pain Trap
special_effect: Wracking pain imposes -4 penalty on attack rolls, skill checks, and ability checks for 1 hour
description: A mystical symbol inscribed on a surface flares with agonizing energy when a creature comes too close. Victims are wracked with unbearable pain, suffering penalties to all actions.

name: Crushing Walls Trap
description: The ceiling of this room begins to slowly descend when the trap is triggered. After one round, the ceiling crushes everything beneath it with enormous force.

name: Energy Drain Trap
description: An invisible eye enchanted with true seeing watches for intruders. When a living creature is detected, a beam of negative energy lashes out, draining the victim's life force and bestowing negative levels.
